---
applyTo: '**'
---
Rules for edits
- Always use `src/utils/dataCache.ts` for content access. Do not call `getCollection()` in pages/components.
- Use the exported ProcessedPost shape (readingTime, excerpt, urlPath, data) when passing post meta.
- For related posts, use `RelatedPostsFinder` from `src/utils/relatedContentOptimized.ts`.
- Search must use `/search.json` (generated by `src/pages/search.json.ts`). Do not manually edit `public/search.json`.

Where to change logic
- Add processing or new metadata in `src/utils/dataCache.ts` only.
- If adding a collection, add raw loader + processed functions and include it in `getAllProcessedContent()` and the search generator.

Build & test
- Run `npm run build` and confirm: no direct `getCollection()` calls, `dist/search.json` exists, and pages compile.

Quick examples
- Replace a `getCollection('posts')` usage with:
  import { getProcessedPosts } from 'src/utils/dataCache';
  const posts = await getProcessedPosts();

- Find related posts:
  const all = await getAllProcessedContent();
  const finder = new RelatedPostsFinder(all);
  const related = finder.findRelated(post, 3);

Minimal checks for PRs
- No new `getCollection()` usages.
- No recomputation of readingTime or excerpts in pages/components.
- Types must use ProcessedPost (no any).

If something breaks
- Revert changes and run `npm run build` locally to reproduce. Check `.astro` cache and `src/utils/dataCache.ts` exports.

- cv-\*.(pdf|md|html) are generated during build time.
- For performance reasons, prefer heavy operations to be indexed during build time.
- Always add professional subtle animations.
- SEO optimations are important.
